po_authorization_ref: Product-Owner explicit authorization of complete end-to-end Phase 2 execution as ONE Phase (decision D12, 2026-07-18). Phase 1B remains ACCEPTED_AND_CLOSED (T0011/D11); Phase 3 remains NOT_STARTED and unauthorized.
scope_allowed: Execute Phase 2 (commercial packages) end-to-end as one Phase: authoritative plan, schema/additive migrations, domain (typed eligibility, ordered grant tiers, server-resolved 5-min offer quotes, atomic quote+auth-context consumption, FREE purchases only, entitlement/session-after-grant boundary), guest Portal discovery/selection/quote/free-purchase, Hotel Admin revisioned CRUD + grace config UI, C-series concurrency+security tests, disposable-database acceptance, live-dark deployment + one reboot + post-reboot verification, evidence and documentation, and one final acceptance report. Delivered DARK: all Phase-2 flags default OFF; legacy public-schema pipeline unchanged.
scope_prohibited: No paid access; no PMS settlement/posting/folio; no Stripe/payment; no IAM-v2 cutover; no dual read/write; no data migration; no dark-feature live enablement during the initial Phase-2 deployment; no Phase 3; no legacy IAM removal; no network/HA changes. Free package acquisition only (price 0, settlement NOT_REQUIRED).
acceptance_verdict: IN_PROGRESS -- Phase 2 implementation authorized and started (WS-A/B plan+migration + WS-C1 domain committed; WS-C2 engine/tests next). Not accepted/closed.
next_action: Complete Phase 2 execution end-to-end, then return one final report for a single Product-Owner Phase-2 acceptance decision.
